# @lindaui/blocks

> Composed UI sections built on **@lindaui/ui** primitives — auth forms, master-detail,
> lists, dialogs, media viewers, and charts. Importable npm package (NOT a copy-paste
> registry). Each block has its OWN flat API and does not leak HeroUI/RAC types.
> This file is for coding agents: every entry, import path, and public API.

All blocks are generic, controlled/mobile-first, and contain zero data-fetching, no
`next`, no `sonner`. Controlled blocks receive state + handlers from you. For the exact
type of any export, read `node_modules/@lindaui/blocks/dist/<name>.d.ts`.

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @lindaui/blocks @lindaui/ui @lindaui/tokens
```

Peers you provide: `react >=19`, `react-dom >=19`, `react-hook-form >=7`, `recharts >=3`
(only for chart blocks), plus `@lindaui/ui` and `@lindaui/tokens`. Import the CSS once
at app root: `import "@lindaui/tokens/css";`.

## Import convention

One block per import path: `@lindaui/blocks/<name>`.

---

## Auth & forms

### @lindaui/blocks/login-form
`<LoginForm onSubmit={(values)=>...} title emailLabel passwordLabel submitLabel loading
error bare />` — RHF handled internally; `onSubmit({email,password})`. `bare` drops the
Card/title for embedding inside a shell (e.g. AuthLayout).

### @lindaui/blocks/auth-layout
Split-screen auth shell. Slots: `logo`, `compactLogo`, `brandHeadline`,
`brandDescription`, `brandFeatures: {icon,label}[]`, `brandFooter`, `title`,
`description`, `footer`, and `children` (the form). Desktop shows a dark brand panel;
without `brandHeadline`/`brandFeatures` it collapses to a single centered form column.

### @lindaui/blocks/auth-provider
Context `{ user }` + `useAuth()` hook. Wrap your app; read the current user anywhere.

### @lindaui/blocks/field-array-form
A select + repeatable rows form via RHF `useFieldArray`.

## Lists & master-detail (controlled)

### @lindaui/blocks/list-item
Selectable row. Controlled selected state + `onSelect`.

### @lindaui/blocks/list-pane
Filterable/searchable list shell with loading/empty/error states. Controlled:
`filters: {key,label,count?}[]`, `activeFilter`, `onFilterChange`, `searchValue`,
`onSearchChange`, `loading`, `error`, `onRetry`, `isEmpty`, empty/error slots. Items go
in via `children`. Does NOT filter for you — filter your data (use `@lindaui/ui/search`).

### @lindaui/blocks/detail-panel
Master-detail right side: empty state + header + meta card + CTA. Controlled.

### @lindaui/blocks/split-workspace
Responsive split `media | panel` (controlled). Props: `media`, `panel`, `overlay?`,
`backHref?`, `backLabel?` (default `"Volver"`), `back?`. Two-column on desktop,
stacked on mobile (uses `useIsDesktop`). Pass `backHref`/`backLabel` to get a
legible default back pill over any media (readability scrim + safe-area, styled
with `WorkspaceBackButton`); `back` is an escape hatch that wins over the pair.

### @lindaui/blocks/workspace-back-button
`<WorkspaceBackButton href label icon? />` — legible back pill (`<a>`, token-driven
`bg-secondary`/`border-border`) that reads over dark or bright media. Used by
`split-workspace`'s default; usable standalone. `icon` defaults to a chevron.

## Dialogs & overlays

### @lindaui/blocks/confirm-dialog
`<ConfirmDialog open onOpenChange onConfirm title description confirmLabel cancelLabel
icon destructive identity={{name}} />` — `destructive` → red confirm button + red icon
box; `identity` → actor chip under the description.

### @lindaui/blocks/image-viewer
Full-bleed media viewer with zoom (uses `viewer-*` tokens).

### @lindaui/blocks/recording-overlay
Voice-recording UI: mic / timer / waveform / stop / cancel / error. Props include
`variant?: "overlay" | "inline"` (default `overlay`). `overlay` covers its container
on a fixed dark `viewer-*` surface (for use over media); `inline` drops the absolute
positioning + forced dark bg, fills its container and inherits the panel surface with
token-driven (legible) text. Content is identical across variants.

## Documents

### @lindaui/blocks/document-panel
Header + per-state body + footer. Controlled. Props: `title`, `subtitle?`, `meta?`,
`metaPlacement?: "block"|"inline"` (default `block`), `statusBadge?`, `state`,
`emptyContent?`, `loadingLabel?`, `notices?`, `footer?`. `metaPlacement="inline"`
flows subtitle + meta on one wrapping row (`subtitle · meta`) instead of stacking.

### @lindaui/blocks/document-reader
Sectioned text reader.

## Charts (over @lindaui/ui/chart + recharts)

All chart blocks share a flat API:
`data: Record<string,string|number>[]`, `config: ChartConfig` (serie → {label,color}),
`categoryKey: string`, `series: string[]` (or `valueKey`/`nameKey` for pie/radial),
`variant?`, `className?`. Series color comes from `var(--color-<key>)` that
`ChartContainer` injects from `config`; dark mode is free.

```tsx
import { AreaChart } from "@lindaui/blocks/area-chart";
const config = { sales: { label: "Sales", color: "var(--chart-1)" } };
<AreaChart data={data} config={config} categoryKey="month" series={["sales"]} />
```

- `@lindaui/blocks/area-chart` — `variant: "default"|"stacked"|"gradient"`
- `@lindaui/blocks/bar-chart`
- `@lindaui/blocks/line-chart`
- `@lindaui/blocks/pie-chart`
- `@lindaui/blocks/radar-chart`
- `@lindaui/blocks/radial-chart`
- `@lindaui/blocks/stat-card` — KPI card: label/value/delta/sparkline
- `@lindaui/blocks/chart-card` — Card shell wrapping a chart
- `@lindaui/blocks/stats-grid` — responsive grid of KPI stat-cards
